channel.title: EDGAR Live Scanner — Social
channel.description: Tweet-ready feed of high-signal SEC filings: M&A, activist, tender offers, going-private, strategic reviews, divestitures.

item.title: $AHT 📤 Divestiture Sells Hilton Garden Inn Jacksonville to Maco Properties for $11.3M cash to Maco Properties, L.L.C. · $11.3 million deal · close 2026-06-11 Mcap $20M · EV $2.8B · Real Estate
